paper_title: Relative Age Models Based on Different Proxies

methods.description: This method involves creating a relative age model using thorium (Th) as a proxy to understand depositional rates and the onset of the Late Cambrian Isotope Excursion (LCIE). It highlights changes in depositional rates and elemental concentrations.

steps.description: Compare depositional rates in the lower and upper parts of the section using the Th-based model.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze depositional rates using Th-based model

steps.description: Adjust the stratigraphic section to reflect the onset of the LCIE at 2.9 m instead of 2 m.
steps.searchable_summary: adjust stratigraphic section for LCIE onset

steps.description: Analyze changes in V and Ni levels and their variability in the lower part of the section.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze V and Ni levels in lower section

methods.description: This method uses carbonate content as a proxy to create a relative age model, focusing on minimal deviation from constant deposition and analyzing changes in elemental concentrations.

steps.description: Evaluate the deviation from constant deposition using the carbonate content model.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate deposition deviation using carbonate content

steps.description: Adjust the onset of the LCIE to 2.3 m in the carbonate content model.
steps.searchable_summary: adjust LCIE onset in carbonate content model

steps.description: Analyze changes in V, Ni, and Cs concentrations and their trends in the middle and top sections.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze V, Ni, Cs trends in carbonate model

methods.description: This method uses pelagic palynomorphs as a proxy to create a relative age model, focusing on shifts in elemental concentration peaks and their reconstructed values.

steps.description: Shift the onset of the LCIE upward by approximately 0.5 m in the palynomorphs model.
steps.searchable_summary: shift LCIE onset in palynomorphs model

steps.description: Analyze shifts in V, Ni, and Cs concentration peaks and their reconstructed values.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze shifts in V, Ni, Cs peaks
outputs: shift analysis of V, Ni, Cs peaks

steps.description: Evaluate changes in Eu/Eu* and Ce/Ce* values and their reversal levels.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate Eu/Eu* and Ce/Ce* value changes
